faq.title: [MOCK] Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: [MOCK] Everything you need to know about Widgetly, the platform, and the launch.

whatIs.question: [MOCK] What is Widgetly?
whatIs.answer: [MOCK] Widgetly is an all-in-one AI tools platform that brings together 500+ free online tools, calculators, converters, generators, PDF editors, and AI assistants in a single, fast, privacy-first interface. Built for students, teachers, professionals, creators, developers, and businesses.

isFree.question: [MOCK] Is Widgetly free to use?
isFree.answer: [MOCK] Yes. Widgetly is 100% free during launch. Every tool on the platform is free to use with no hidden fees, no watermarks, and no sign-up required for most tools. Optional premium tiers may be added later for power users and teams.

launch.question: [MOCK] When does Widgetly launch?
launch.answer: [MOCK] Widgetly is launching soon. Join the waitlist to get early access, launch updates, sneak peeks, and a founders' discount when we go live.

account.question: [MOCK] Do I need to create an account?
account.answer: [MOCK] Most Widgetly tools work without an account. A free optional account unlocks cloud sync, tool history, saved preferences, and cross-device access to your tools and data.

privacy.question: [MOCK] Is my data private and secure?
privacy.answer: [MOCK] Yes. Widgetly is privacy-first by design. Files are processed in your browser whenever possible, sensitive data is end-to-end encrypted, and we never sell your information to third parties.

suggest.question: [MOCK] Can I suggest a tool to be added?
suggest.answer: [MOCK] Absolutely. We build tools based on user requests. Use the 'Suggest a Tool' link to tell us what you need and we will prioritize the most-requested tools for our launch roadmap.

mobile.question: [MOCK] Does Widgetly work on mobile devices?
mobile.answer: [MOCK] Yes. Widgetly is built mobile-first. Every tool is fully responsive and tested on phones, tablets, and desktops — with fast load times and touch-friendly interfaces on every screen size.

different.question: [MOCK] How is Widgetly different from other tools platforms?
different.answer: [MOCK] Widgetly combines AI search, 500+ curated tools, a privacy-first architecture, edge-deployed performance, and a single unified interface. Instead of bookmarking dozens of separate websites, you get everything in one fast, free platform.

pdf.name: [MOCK] PDF Tools
pdf.longDesc: [MOCK] Free online PDF tools: merge, split, compress, convert to Word/Excel/JPG, edit, sign, protect. No upload limits, no watermarks, runs in your browser.

image.name: [MOCK] Image Tools
image.longDesc: [MOCK] Online image editor: resize, crop, compress, convert between JPG, PNG, WebP, SVG, AVIF. Background remover, watermark, filters, and batch processing.

video.name: [MOCK] Video Tools
video.longDesc: [MOCK] Browser-based video tools: compress, trim, cut, merge, transcribe audio to text, generate subtitles, convert to MP4, WebM, GIF. No software to install.

ai.name: [MOCK] AI Tools
ai.longDesc: [MOCK] Free AI tools for writing, summarizing, rewriting, translating, generating images, building resumes, and answering questions. Powered by the latest LLMs.

calculators.name: [MOCK] Calculators
calculators.longDesc: [MOCK] Hundreds of free online calculators: mortgage, loan, BMI, calorie, tip, percentage, age, GPA, grade, scientific, financial, health, and math calculators.

converters.name: [MOCK] Converters
converters.longDesc: Convertisseurs gratuits d'unités, de devises et de formats de fichiers : longueur, poids, température, surface, volume, temps, vitesse, données, codes couleur et plus de 150 devises avec des taux en temps réel.

seo.name: [MOCK] SEO Tools
seo.longDesc: [MOCK] Free SEO tools: meta tag generator, keyword density checker, sitemap generator, robots.txt tester, SERP preview, backlink checker, page speed insights.

education.name: [MOCK] Education Tools
education.longDesc: [MOCK] Tools for teachers and students: lesson plan generator, quiz maker, flashcards, study timer, GPA calculator, citation generator, math solver, writing prompts.

developer.name: [MOCK] Developer Tools
developer.longDesc: [MOCK] Free developer utilities: JSON formatter and validator, regex tester, Base64 encoder, URL encoder, JWT decoder, CSS minifier, diff checker, hash generator.

business.name: [MOCK] Business Tools
business.longDesc: [MOCK] Business productivity tools: invoice generator, contract templates, proposal builder, NDA generator, business plan templates, SWOT analysis, OKR tracker.

about.title: [MOCK] About Us
about.subtitle: [MOCK] The team building the all-in-one tools platform we always wished existed.
about.missionBody: [MOCK] We're building Widgetly because the modern web is fragmented. You need a PDF editor here, a calculator there, an AI writer somewhere else, and a developer tool across town. We want to put all of those — and hundreds more — behind a single search bar, with the speed and polish of the best native apps.

small.title: [MOCK] Small, senior, async
small.body: [MOCK] Everyone on the team has deep experience and owns their work end-to-end. We write things down so context isn't lost across time zones.

remote.title: [MOCK] Fully remote
remote.body: [MOCK] Work from wherever you're most productive. We overlap a few hours with US Eastern for the team that wants it; the rest is async.

hours.title: [MOCK] Sensible hours
hours.body: [MOCK] We protect focus time and respect evenings and weekends. Tools that "just work" start with a team that isn't burned out.

pay.title: [MOCK] Pay transparency
pay.body: [MOCK] Salary bands are public within the company and tied to role and experience, not negotiation. The same role pays the same, anywhere.

about.teamSubtitle: [MOCK] Senior builders, mostly remote, working across time zones.
about.joinBody: [MOCK] We're hiring across product, engineering, AI, and design. If you ship work you're proud of, get in touch.
